_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 9 currently banned, 2710 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Total attempts up to 13137 (from 12420, +717 new). fail2ban total bans 2710 (from 2585, +125). 9 IPs currently banned (was 6). Standard botnet scanning continues, no targeted attacks detected. Only authorized logins from known IP via publickey.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 16 usages across viewer.js, upload.js, merge.js, annotate.js, pages.js - all static templates, clearing operations, or escaped via escapeHtml()/textContent. No user data injected unsafely.

annotate_module_review.innerHTML_note: Only used for clearing annotLayer.innerHTML = ''. All annotations rendered via createElement + style properties.
annotate_module_review.user_data_handling: Annotation text stored internally via selection.toString(), never rendered as HTML. Toast messages use textContent.
annotate_module_review.pdf_lib_usage: Loads PDF via PDFDocument.load with slice copy. Draws rectangles/lines for annotations. No external data injection.

pages_module_review.innerHTML_note: Used for clearing grid, static SVG checkboxes, and static button HTML restore. No user data in innerHTML.
pages_module_review.page_cards_safe: All created via createElement with textContent for labels. aria-label uses integer values only.
pages_module_review.pdf_lib_usage: Copies pages from source PDF, applies rotation. Uses ignoreEncryption: true for compatibility.
pages_module_review.drag_drop_safe: Internal state only, no external data injection via drag events.

upload_module_review.filereader_prototype_patching: LOW risk - temporary patch restored on loadend, only affects progress tracking

cgi_security.note: CGI location block in nginx but no cgi-bin directory or scripts in webroot

codex_proxy.risk: LOW - proxy only accessible when backend is active, limited to localhost

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.
notes: Full security review completed - 29 checks passed, 0 critical findings
Reviewed new annotate.js module (TASK-004): All annotations rendered via DOM API, no innerHTML with user data, showToast uses textContent, download filenames sanitized
Reviewed new pages.js module (TASK-007): Page cards built via createElement+textContent, drag-and-drop uses internal state only, undo stack bounded at 30 entries, pdf-lib usage safe
All 13 JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write(), or unsafe setTimeout/setInterval string patterns
16 innerHTML usages found across 5 files - all verified safe (clearing, static templates, or properly escaped)
SSH brute force increased +717 attempts since last review (~2h ago). fail2ban handling well with 2710 total bans.
Only authorized SSH logins from known IP (109.81.31.32) via publickey authentication
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (79 days remaining)
recommendations: LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config (no scripts exist)
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
